calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment (Default Prove-Up)
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment (Default Prove-Up)
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Intergrated Products & Supplies LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Integrated Products & Su, and Craig Mabrey, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Merchant Services LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
No appearance by defendants Intergrated Products & Supplies LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Integrated Products & Su, or Craig Mabrey, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for common counts/open book/collections was filed on February 7, 2018, and personally served on defendant Intergrated Products & Supplies LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Integrated Products & Su's Registered Agent on February 26, 2018.
Service was effectuated on defendant Graig Mabrey, an individual, on March 5, 2018. (Via Substitute Service on February 23, 2018).
Default was entered as to defendant Intergrated Products & Supplies LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Integrated Products & Su on April 12, 2018.
Default was entered as to defendant Greg Mabry, an individual, on May 15, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 19, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 17, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Merchant Services LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Intergrated Products & Supplies LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Integrated Products & Su, and Craig Mabrey, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $171,863.27.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,910.42.
Costs - $600.75.

Total - $180,374.44.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
